description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark brown with subtle lighter streaks and mottling along the wings and back, giving it a camouflaged appearance. The head is slightly rounded with a distinct, gently curved beak that tapers to a point, suitable for probing or picking. The wings are streamlined and close to the body, while the tail feathers are straight and extend well beyond the body, contributing to its overall length. The legs are short and not prominently visible, but appear to be a muted grayish color. The bird's surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, resembling natural feathers.
description: A slender, dark brown bird with a long, straight tail and subtle streaked plumage. It has a gently curved beak and a streamlined, camouflaged appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail, and gently curved beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, extended tail and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and back feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the bird's streamlined body, long tail, and subtle feather pattern.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, pointed beak, and the narrow profile of the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with subtle streaks and spots on wings and back
